name: Henry Fonda
title: Last known photo of Henry Fonda, taken on March 29, 1982, five months before his death.
description: Henry Fonda was photographed on March 29, 1982, during the final months of his life. Fonda had been battling heart disease for years and was largely homebound during his last months. Just weeks before his death, he finally won his only competitive Academy Award for Best Actor for his role in "On Golden Pond" (1981), co-starring with Katharine Hepburn and his daughter Jane Fonda. Too ill to attend the ceremony, Jane accepted the award on his behalf. He died on August 12, 1982, at Cedars-Sinai Medical Center in Los Angeles from heart failure. He was 77 years old.
bio: Henry Fonda was an American actor whose career spanned five decades in film, television, and stage. His iconic roles in "12 Angry Men" and "The Grapes of Wrath" cemented him as one of Hollywood's greatest leading men.

location.name: 10744 W Chalon Rd, Los Angeles, CA 90049
